raw_consumer_statement: My Citibank card was charged {$330.00} and {$650.00} on XX/XX/year> with XXXX for a flight from XXXX to XXXX XXXX in XXXX which I did not purchase. I disputed this to Citibank and closed out my card. XXXX  denied the claim as my " name was on the ticket ''. However, I know I did not make this charge, and my name being on the ticket doesn't prove anything.
